webhookUrl.title: Kanbantic webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: Full URL of the Kanbantic worker webhook, e.g. https://kanbantic-api.<account>.workers.dev/api/apify-webhook

webhookSecret.title: Kanbantic webhook HMAC secret
webhookSecret.description: Shared HMAC-SHA256 secret. Must match the worker's APIFY_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var.

queryLimit.title: Max repos per run
queryLimit.description: Cap on records the Actor scrapes per run. Defaults to 30. GitHub Search rate-limits ~10 req/min unauthenticated, ~30 req/min with a token.

githubToken.title: GitHub PAT (optional)
githubToken.description: Optional GitHub personal-access token. With it, Code Search returns full results and rate limits are higher. Without it the run still works but fewer results come back.
